pi_items.source: task.json, setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py logic
OpenC3 COSMOS built-in demo target structure and export_result.sh API queries
OpenC3 cosmos-project demo target TELEMETRY definition for INST HEALTH_STATUS
OpenC3 cosmos-project demo target TELEMETRY definition for INST ADCS
task.json description and verifier.py evaluation logic

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task operates on the synthetically generated 'INST' demo satellite telemetry built into OpenC3 COSMOS. The expected telemetry items (TEMP1, TEMP2, TEMP3, TEMP4 from the HEALTH_STATUS packet, and Q1, Q2 from the ADCS packet) are explicitly verified to exist in the OpenC3 simulation target configuration via direct repository inspection. The output path /home/ga/Desktop/correlation_report.json and the minimum requirement of 20 samples explicitly match the task instructions, setup scripts, and the evaluation constraints in verifier.py.
